titleStmt.title: SII 23.495: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 495. (A.R. No. 495 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the same wall Tribh. Rājēndra Chōḷa (III): year 15

summary.p: The date is given as Tulā, śu. 9, Thursday, Aviṭṭam equivalent to A.D. 1260, October 14.

This registers a sale of 2 adjacent house-sites measuring 3 kōl and 9 kōl east to west with a depth of 14 kōl situated on the north side of the tirumaḍai vīḷāgam of the temple of Tiruchchattimuṟṟam-Uḍaiyār at Kīḻ-Paḻaiyāṟu alias Rājarājapuram in Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu to a maṭha at that place belonging to the lineage of Meyñānaśivar, for 700 kāśu by the temple of Śoṉṉavāraṟivār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
harasvastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājentira coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu navamiyum viyāḻak kiḻamai peṟṟaa
viṭṭattunāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu viṅkunirt turutti Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāraṟivār koil Āticaṇṭeśvaradevar tiru A
ruḷāl Innāyanār koyil tānattom kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷa nāṭṭu kiḻpaḻaiyāṟāna rācarācapurattu Uṭaiyār tiruccatti muṟṟa muṭaiyār ko
yil tirukkāmakkoṭṭamuṭaiya periya nācciyār kiḻaittirumaṭa viḷākattu tiru taḷi tirumaṭattu mutaliyār marutilpperumāḷāna meñānaśivar santā
nattu mutaliyār śiṣyarkaḷil Ittevaṟku Iṟaiyili maṉaivilaipramā ṇaicaivutiṭṭu Innāyaṉār tirumaṭaviḷaākattu Uḷḷāl Orucciṟaka nil vaṭakkil tiruvitiyil Iṟṟai
nāḷāl Isantānattukku Iṟaiiliyāka caṇṭeśvarapperuvilai viṟṟukkuṭutta maṉai kol mukkolum Ittevaṟku 10 4vatu Āni mātattu caṇṭeśvaraperuvilaiyāka
Iṟaiili maṉaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭutta maṉaikol Oṉpatiṉ kolum Āka maṉaikol paṉṉirukolukku kiḻpāṟkellai Uṭaiyārai pūcikkum tevappiḷḷai nampiyār ma
ṉaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruvitikku vaṭakkum merpāṟ kellai tirumañcuṇai peruvaḻikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai puṟampil vaṭakkilt tiruvitiyil teruvoḻuṅkukku
teṟkum Āka Icaiñca Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa maṉaikku kiḻmel kol paṉṉirukolukku teṉmaṭal kol patinālinālk ku 100 6 10 8 Ikkuḻi nūṟṟu Aṟupatteṭṭukkum Emmi
licaiñca vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 7 100 Ikkācu Eḻunūṟum śrīpaṇṭārattil taṭṭoṭṭupaṭa kaṭṭikku Oṭukkivittuk koṇṭa kaācu 5 100- ṟum Attiratevaṟku pādapatma
ttukku śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkuvikka koṇṭa kācu 2 100 m Ip paṭikaḷāl śrīpaṇṭāratte Oṭukkuvittu Iṟaiili maṉaivilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutto
m Immaṉai kol 10 2- kku vāniḷa Itil niṉṟa teṅkukaḷum kkina maramum kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimai(k)
kaḷumakappaṭ Ippaṭikku kalli nāmattāl Ippaṭi ṭikkuṭut tom Ippaṭi Iṟaiyili maṭamāka caṇṭeśvarapperuvi
lai viṟṟukkuṭutta kiḻme kaṭṭukku kol kuḻi Oṭukkum Ikkācu Eḻunūṟum Ittiruppaṇikaḷukku Uṭalāka śrīpaṇṭārattu
Oṭukkivittuk koṇṭu cantirātittavarai cellakkaṭavutāka Iṟaiili maṭamāka kalveṭṭikkuṭu meñānaśiva santānattu mutali śiṣyar kaḷil Atta devaṟkku Uṭaiyār coṉṉa
vāraṟivārkoyil śvaratevar tiruvaruḷāl Innāyaṉār koyilt tānattom Ippaṭikku Ivai koyiṟkkaṇakku kaāvaṉū ruṭaiyāṉ tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyāṉ tiruvekampa(ṭi)ppiriyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai koyilkkaṇakku kāvanūruṭaiyāṉ co Eḻuttu kaṇakku kāvaṉūruṭaiyāṉ Aṉaittukaiyaḻaki yāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai jaya
vatukkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu IppaṭikkuStops here.
Digital edition of SII 23.495 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
